findings.title: HTTP 500 response detected
findings.expected_result: Checkout should handle an empty cart with a validation message.

findings.title: Broken link detected
findings.expected_result: Product links should resolve to product detail pages.
findings.actual_result: The product detail route returns HTTP 404.

findings.title: Console error detected
findings.expected_result: Product pages should not emit console errors.

findings.title: Invalid email accepted
findings.expected_result: Registration should reject malformed email values.

findings.title: Page did not become idle
findings.expected_result: Order history should finish loading or show an empty state.
